per_turn_leaks.student_message: Do you have any sweating, nausea, or dizziness with it?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: Actually, yeah... I have been feeling a bit fatigued and run down lately. It's hard to explain, but I just feel really drained all the time, like I'm constantly running on empty. And sometimes, when I cough, I'll get this weird, achy feeling in my chest that's not exactly painful, but it's definitely uncomfortable. As for sweating or nausea, I don't think so... unless you count waking up with night sweats? That's been happening a few nights a week now, and it's really weird because I'm not even hot when I go to bed!

per_turn_leaks.student_message: Has anyone in your family had other serious medical conditions?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: Actually, my maternal grandmother passed away from lung cancer when I was younger... but that's about all I know. She didn't have any other health issues besides that.

per_turn_leaks.student_message: Is there anything else you think I should know about your health?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: To be honest, I'm worried that this might be related to something more serious than just a cold or allergies. My mom has asthma, and my grandmother passed away from lung cancer, so I guess I've always been a bit anxious about breathing issues in my family. But at the same time, I don't want to jump to conclusions - I'm hoping you can help me figure out what's going on and get some answers!
